last_run.summary: Completed v5.0 code/config/VSCode/report tooling for single-policy 3-user Mainline-A. Focused tests and full pytest pass. The 9-algorithm 100K-step run is resource-blocked locally because CUDA is unavailable and the CPU-only run did not complete the first GRPO rollout in practical time; blocked statuses and reports were written.

validation.summary: Code/config/report/VSCode validation passed, including full pytest. The corrected full17-equivalent experiment did not produce performance metrics in this local runtime; the result JSON records all 9 algorithms as blocked with resource errors, and CL-PPO remains frozen.

open_items: DASHBOARD-EXTERNAL-COMPAT: dashboard 兼容性需在外部仓库环境复核 (Medium, external)

paper2-v5.0 BLOCKER: local CUDA is unavailable due old NVIDIA driver; CPU-only execution did not complete the first GRPO 2048-step rollout in practical time, so the 9-algorithm 100K-step single-policy 3-user run needs a working GPU/updated driver or external long-run resource.
paper2-v5.0 BLOCKER: no corrected-interface performance metrics exist yet; `results/benchmark_mainline_a_single_policy_3user_full17.json` is a blocked-status artifact, not performance evidence.
paper2-v5.0 GATE: CL-PPO remains frozen until the corrected single-policy 3-user benchmark completes and human review accepts PPO as a valid baseline.
